title: MikroTik RBLDF-5nD, LDF 5, 9dBi 5GHz antenna, 1x LAN, L3
description: LDF 5 or "Lite dish feed" is a very specific outdoor CPE device with two built-in antennas with 9dBi gain. LDF 5 was designed for mounting on satellite dish antenna instead of the original feed LNB with 40 mm mounting. Antenna gain maybe increased up to 33dBi when will be used with 100cm satellite dish LDF 5 unit includes 2x2 MIMO 5GHz radio part with transmission power up to 25dBm , compatibility with protocols 802.11a/n , maximum 300Mbps data rate, 1x 10/100Mbps LAN, 64MB RAM, 16MB flash, 600MHz processor and L3 license Device PoE injector Power adapter 24V / 0.38A
